title: Crying Emoji & Kaomoji: Copy & Paste 😭 Tears Combos
meta_description: Copy and paste crying emoji like 😭 😢 🥹, sobbing kaomoji such as (T_T), and tearful combo sets for captions and replies. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Every crying emoji from full 😭 sobbing to 🥹 held-back tears, plus kaomoji and ready-made tear combos. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: The crying emoji is one of the most-used characters on the internet — 😭 alone doubles as genuine sobbing and exaggerated crying-laughing. This page collects every crying emoji variant, the water and heartbreak symbols that pair with them, classic Japanese crying kaomoji like (;﹏;), and one-click combo sets for captions, comments, and group-chat reactions. If you want quieter melancholy rather than open tears, see the sad emoji page linked below.

sections.label: Core Crying Faces
sections.intro: The main crying faces, from loud sobbing to a single happy tear.

sections.label: Tears & Rain
sections.intro: Water and weather symbols that amplify a crying message or combo.

sections.label: Distress Faces
sections.intro: Faces on the edge of tears — weary, overwhelmed, or pleading.

sections.label: Kaomoji
sections.intro: Japanese-style text faces that cry with full-width tears — paste them anywhere plain text works.
